title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet
director: Arthur Lubin, Gerry Chiniquy, Robert McKimson
writer: Jameson Brewer, John C. Rose, Joe DiMona
actors: Don Knotts, Carole Cook, Jack Weston
plot: Meek and mild mannered bookkeeper Henry Limpet has few passions in life. It's mid-1941 and he would love to join the Navy but has been rated 4F. His friend George Stickle is in the Navy and lays it on pretty thick. If Henry could ...
